title: Spoken Word
description: Client-side mod that sends commands or messages when something happens!
body:
# Spoken Word

This lightweight client-side mod sends chat messages and/or commands when something happens.

## Features
- Send messages or commands on certain game events
- Filters for certain events like mob death, player join, etc

See the [wiki](https://skilles.gitbook.io/spoken-word/) for more information

## Configuration
![Screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/vDwIWnw.png)
<details>

Old version
![Screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/JLin1Os.png)
</details>

## Dependencies
[Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api/versions?g=1.20.2)  
[Yet Another Config Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)  
[Modmenu (Fabric only)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) 

**NOTE:** This mod underwent a complete rewrite for version 1.20. The old version will no longer be supported.
